title: Moody
description: An AI-based student wellbeing concept created during an international BIP exchange in Finland.
longDescription: Moody was created during a BIP exchange in Finland, where second-year CMGT students collaborated in international teams. I worked together with a Dutch, Finnish, and Spanish teammate. Our team was assigned the SDG 'Good Health & Well-being'. We designed Moody, an AI concept that could help LUT students build routines and offer support when they feel stuck. I contributed to the design process and helped build the front-end of the application.

title: Poppy
description: A music application designed to help people discover songs outside of their usual bubble.
longDescription: Poppy was a school project where we worked in separate front-end and back-end teams to build a music application that helps users step outside their musical bubble. I was part of the front-end team. I designed the logo and created the high-fidelity wireframes, so the team had a clear visual direction for the colors, buttons, and overall look of the application. I also helped build the front-end and supported the design process. I wanted the app to feel different from Spotify, so I introduced a Tinder-style swipe feature. In addition, I created the admin page, built components, and presented Poppy to the company Redkiwi.
